name: Stock Spirits Group PLC
summary: Stock Spirits Group PLC produces and distributes branded spirits in Central and Eastern Europe, and Italy. It offers a range of spirits, such as vodka, vodka-based flavored liqueurs, rum, brandy, wines, whisky, herbal bitters, and limoncello. The company also exports its products to approximately 50 countries worldwide. Stock Spirits Group PLC was founded in 1884 and is based in Wooburn Green, the United Kingdom.
